allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o BatchMode=yes root@tappaas1.mgmt.internal "qm status 150 2>&1; echo '---'; qm config 150 2>&1 | head -15")
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes root@tappaas1.mgmt.internal "qm stop 150 2>&1 | head -3; sleep 2; qm destroy 150 --destroy-unreferenced-disks 1 --purge 1 2>&1 | head -3")
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes root@tappaas1.mgmt.internal "qm status 150 2>&1 || echo 'VM destroyed'")
